channel.title: aws on Morgoth
channel.description: Recent content in aws on Morgoth

item.title: AWS CLF
item.description: CLF Foundational: 6个月经验. Cloud Practitioner Foundational(CLF). Fundamental cloud concepts for AWS Understanding AWS core services Introduction to security & architecture on AWS AWS certified cloud practitioner exam prep

item.title: AWS SAA
item.description: SAA Associate: 一年经验. Solutions Architect Associate(SAA); Developer, SysOps Administrator

item.title: AWS SAP
item.description: SAP Professional: 两年经验. Solutions Architect Professional(SAP), Devops Engineer.

item.title: AWS Management
item.description: AWS Monitor CloudWatch 监控和管理服务，收集logs, metrics 和 events，支持基于metrics的alert。 MTTR TCO CloudTrail 可以用来记录，持续监控和保留与AWS基础设施

item.title: AWS
item.description: AWS https://github.com/donnemartin/awesome-aws aws certification: Foundational: 6个月经验. Cloud Practitioner Foundational(CLF). Associate: 一年经验. Solutions Architect Associate(SAA); Developer, SysOps Administrator Professional: 两年经验. Solutions Architect Professional(SAP), Devops Engineer. Specialty: 特殊领域. SDK python https://github.com/boto/boto3 golang https://github.com/aws/aws-sdk-go AWS Management Console 通过webUI管理资源. kkkkjjkijijijkkjddkkkkjj AWS Command Line Interface https://github.com/aws/aws-cli https://github.com/awslabs/aws-shell

item.title: AWS Compute Services
item.description: AWS Compute Service EC2 Elastic Compute. AMI: Amazon Machine Image. EC2实例类型: 通用型实例 计算优化型实例 内存优化型实例 加速计算型实例 存储优化型实例 EC2付费类型: 按需(on-deman

item.title: AWS Containers
item.description: AWS Containers ECR Elastic Container Registry. ECS Elastic Container Service. EKS Elastic Kubernetes Service. 通过AWS CLI创建EKS 通过MC创建的资源都可以通过CLI(aws)创建. 创建具有公有和私有子网且符合 Amazon EKS 要求

item.title: AWS Data
item.description: Data Processing AWS Glue AWS上的ETL(extract, transform and load)服务，提供数据的提取，转换，加载服务。 Data pipeline 也是ETL服务。 EMR EMR: Elastic MapReduce. AWS的大数据平台

item.title: AWS Database
item.description: AWS Database RDS Relational Database Service， 关系型数据库服务. 支持的数据库引擎： Amazon Aurora PostgreSQL MySQL MariaDB Oracle Database Microsoft SQL Server Amazon Aurora 兼容mysql和postgresql. DynamoDB 非关系数据库(

item.title: AWS Network
item.description: AWS Network VPC Virtual Private Cloud. EC2的私有内部网络. subnets route tables internet gateways nat gateways ENI: Elastic network interfaces. pic ELB ELB: Elastic Load Balancing 弹性负载均衡，可以和EC2,ECS和lambda集成. https://aws.amazon.com/cn/elasticloadbalancing/features/ 支持四种负载均衡

item.title: AWS Security
item.description: Security Acceptable Use Policy. IAM IAM: Identity and Access Management. STS: Security Token Service. ACL: Access control list. SG: Security Group. https://aws.amazon.com/cn/iam/ $aws iam list-users IAM的三种身份类型: Users Groups Roles IAM通过Policy(json)分配权限。 SSO sso登陆: aws sso

item.title: AWS Storage
item.description: AWS Storage S3 Simple Storage Service. S3分类： S3标准 S3标准-IA S3单区-IA S3智能分层 S3 Glacier S3 Glacire Deep Archive 特点: 无限存储 单个对象达到5Tb 一次写入，多次读取 99%持
